title: More Nonsense Limerick 29
content:
There was an old person of Down,
    Whose face was adorned with a frown;
    When he opened the door, 
    For one minute or more,
    He alarmed all the people of Down.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 29", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
